MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-22-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DONNA HIGLEY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT HIGLEY, DONNA

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HIGLEY, DONNA
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HIGLEY, DONNA

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-22-2010 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DONNA HIGLEY'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTERS' FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HIGLEY, DONNA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF DONNA HIGLEY ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
